description: CHG Trigger Rules from YODA_OC1_OC2_OPERATIONAL_BRIEF.md v1.0. Yoda monitors these and raises CHG+Telegram alert when triggered.

TRIGGER-01.name: OC2 arrival
TRIGGER-01.action: 10-step setup sequence: Ollama config, Gemma4 install, Tailscale mesh, OpenClaw config update, HA validation

additionalActions.name: qwen3.5:cloud reassessment
additionalActions.action: Re-benchmark qwen3.5:cloud on OC2. Latency failure (42.3s avg) driven by thinking mode on tool/coding tasks. Re-test with think:false on all 5 benchmark tasks. If avg latency <=20s -> approve for async/batch Tier 2. If still fails -> close out permanently.

TRIGGER-02.name: Both OC2 nodes live
TRIGGER-02.condition: OC2-A and OC2-B both online and validated
TRIGGER-02.detection: manual — validated after TRIGGER-01 complete for both nodes
TRIGGER-02.action: Activate HA architecture. Configure NAS shared state.

TRIGGER-03.name: Gemma4 validated on OC2
TRIGGER-03.condition: Gemma4:26b confirmed running on OC2 at acceptable performance
TRIGGER-03.action: Switch Shield/Lex/Sage/Warden from Haiku to Gemma4:26b local (Tier 1)

TRIGGER-04.name: OpenClaw security patch
TRIGGER-04.condition: New OpenClaw version released with security fix
TRIGGER-04.action: Critical CVE: update within 48h. High: within 7 days. Raise CHG. Freeze client onboarding if P1.
TRIGGER-04.details: v2026.5.3: Plugin install hardening, channel streaming reliability, gateway performance, config validation. Multiple stability improvements. No explicit CVE/security-critical marker.
TRIGGER-04.notes: Regular release with stability improvements. Previous critical release: v2026.4.29 (High, now patched).

TRIGGER-05.name: Ollama Cloud PoC PASS
TRIGGER-05.condition: PoC Phase 5 returns PASS or PARTIAL PASS
TRIGGER-05.action: Implement 4-tier model strategy. Ken decision gate required before Phase 6.
TRIGGER-05.note: Full PoC PASS (CHG-0120). kimi-k2.6:cloud: Q=4.6/5, L=6.8s avg — implemented as Tier 2. glm-5.1: FAIL (thinking mode, 221s+). qwen3.5:cloud: FAIL (42.3s avg with /no_think). Phase 6 implemented. Monthly glm-5.1 no-think check cron active.
TRIGGER-05.qwen35Findings: Quality 4.6/5 OK. Latency 42.3s FAIL (/no_think helped text tasks, not code/tool). Reassessment queued for TRIGGER-01-A (OC2 arrival).

TRIGGER-06.name: OpenClaw v4.0 ships
TRIGGER-06.detection: automated — same daily release check cron as TRIGGER-04
TRIGGER-06.action: P3 gate assessment. Present Ken with native multi-agent vs CrewAI evaluation within 24h.

TRIGGER-07.name: First P2 client
TRIGGER-07.condition: First paying client onboarded to P2 platform
TRIGGER-07.action: Execute onboarding checklist. Run S1-S7 compliance audit. Ensure Tier 0/1 only for client data.

TRIGGER-08.name: Daily API cost threshold
TRIGGER-08.action: T1 ($60): alert Ken. T2 ($80): escalate. T3 ($100): pause and alert.

TRIGGER-09.name: Warden model drift
TRIGGER-09.detection: automated — Warden cron every 15min, escalation via warden-escalation-pending.json
TRIGGER-09.action: Yoda remediates within 1 heartbeat. Log CHG. Alert Ken.

TRIGGER-10.name: Business stream migration OC1 to OC2
TRIGGER-10.condition: OC2 live, Aria + business agents ready to migrate
TRIGGER-10.action: Migrate Aria + specialist agents from OC1 to OC2. Update routing. Validate.

TRIGGER-11.name: glm-5.1 no-think mode availability
TRIGGER-11.condition: Monthly check: has Ollama released a no-think/non-reasoning variant of glm-5.1:cloud?
TRIGGER-11.detection: automated — monthly cron checks Ollama model library
TRIGGER-11.action: If no-think mode confirmed available: re-run B2 (coding) and B4 (tool-use) benchmarks with it. If avg latency <=20s and quality >=3.5 -> raise CHG to add as Tier 2 alongside kimi-k2.6. If still fails -> skip month, check again next month.
TRIGGER-11.note: glm-5.1 PoC failure: 221s+ latency (thinking mode). Model quality potential is unknown. Worth revisiting if no-think mode ships.

TRIGGER-12.name: Agent allowlist sync
TRIGGER-12.condition: CI Cycle B decision recorded (new models approved/deprecated) OR model-policy.json tierStrategy updated (new models added/removed)
TRIGGER-12.detection: automated -- allowlist-detect.sh cron (every 30 min). Compares policy lastUpdated + ci-agent-state.json cycleHistory against allowlist-sync-state.json lastSyncAt.
TRIGGER-12.action: Run zsh scripts/allowlist-sync.sh --source <ci-cycle-b|strategy-update>. Log CHG. Alert Ken via Telegram with diff summary.
TRIGGER-12.notes: Idempotent -- safe to run on every strategy change. Script exits 0 if already current, 1 if changes applied.
